response.justification: The candidate has extensive full-stack software engineering experience but lacks demonstrable expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. His background is primarily in web, mobile, and embedded software, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI accelerator modeling experience.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience with performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
Active contributor to open-source tools and community education initiatives
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling experience
Lacks demonstrated background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware performance specialization
